subject: Use Spring Kafka for ACMR
commit_message:
Use Spring Kafka for ACMR

This uses Spring Kafka instead of policy-common message bus

Issue-ID: POLICY-5510
Signed-off-by: danielhanrahan <daniel.hanrahan@est.tech>
Change-Id: I487467333c66f81cf753785c957360fe4a9b1205
